title: Fans on concourses instead of in seats, claims Fifa
summary_full: Fifa says numerous empty seats were visible in the near-sell-out Group A match between South Korea and the Czech Republic because of fans remaining on concourses.
summary_public: Fifa says numerous empty seats were visible in the near-sell-out Group A match between South Korea and the Czech Republic because of fans remaining on concourses.

CZ.label: neutral
CZ.evidence: Czech Republic because of fans remaining on concourses
